title: Signal
description: Canonical envelope produced by lib/normalize-signal.js for any inbound buying-signal payload (e.g. from Sillage). This is the fixed contract between the webhook ingest layer and the pipeline.

type.description: Inferred signal category. 'other' when no keyword match is found.

detail.description: Free-text description of the signal, as close to the source wording as possible.

detected_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the signal was detected upstream (falls back to ingest time if unknown).

source.description: Origin of the signal. 'sillage' for the hackathon integration; kept generic so other feeds can plug in.

raw.description: Original, unmodified payload as received, kept for audit/debug.
